title: The Ledger of Seven Crossings
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A retired archivist inherits a 19th-century lending library ledger with seven borrower names crossed out in blood; tracing each name reveals an unsolved murder tied to a secret society, and the seventh name belongs to the archivist herself, dated 1872.
long_description: A retired archivist inherits a 19th-century lending library ledger with seven borrower names crossed out in blood; tracing each name reveals an unsolved murder tied to a secret society, and the seventh name belongs to the archivist herself, dated 1872.
